rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §38.158 governs concussion training courses for coaches and athletic trainers. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no operative overlap.
quote: Sec. 38.158. TRAINING COURSES. (a) The University Interscholastic League shall approve for coaches of interscholastic athletic activities training courses that provide for not less than two hours of training in the subject matter of concussions, including evaluation, prevention, symptoms, risks, and long-term effects.
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
